entities.name: Moonshot Project
entities.context: High-difficulty ambitious project that expands capability even when it results in objective failure

entities.name: Slam Dunk
entities.context: Guaranteed victory that reinforces existing competencies but does not expand the toolkit

entities.name: Developmental Value
entities.context: Growth and capability expansion that creates higher long-term ceiling, distinct from immediate strategic value

entities.name: Capacity Building
entities.context: The accumulation of skills, resilience, and capability that dictates the scale of future attempts

entities.name: Stress and Stretch
entities.context: The mechanism through which growth occurs in individuals and organizations

entities.name: Resilience
entities.context: An asset built through moonshot projects that persists after the project ends

entities.name: Leveling Up the Player
entities.context: Metaphor for capability expansion vs merely winning individual games

relationships.context: Moonshots deliver developmental value even when they fail financially or objectively
Slam dunks maintain capital and confidence but do not contribute to capacity building
Growth is a function of stress and stretch applied to a system
Moonshots force acquisition of new skills and building of resilience
Moonshots level up the player rather than just winning the game
Capacity building is the mechanism through which developmental value manifests long-term
